channel.title: VLC on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in VLC on Tech Tracker

item.title: MX Player Vs VLC Player ? Which To Choose And Why ?
item.description: ** <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-pCBYua3Xdr8/XoIcWMQkZeI/AAAAAAAABP4/gX0sugYzUfEX8m9G1ZkqSXZp-YCQ0WIEACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/IMG_20200111_105332_780-02-11.jpeg" alt=""> ** ** MX Player Vs VLC Player ?** If you are watching videos or movies that you spend more on viewing content you may encountered with these two apps popularly preffered by most users and millions of downloads, MX Player or VLC Player are the first choices as it tops the list. - **MX Player ** If you are probably installed or not MX player is from different company before than it got purchased by times india now there is alot of changes they made that made MX player originality got really disturbed and the features made some player feel and look changed however UI of MX player not got any changes but list and trackers that causing mx player lost its glory.
